parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json; const invoiceNumber = 'INV-' + new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 90000 + 10000); const invoiceDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const dueDate = new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Map from Notion property_ fields const vendorName = d.property_vendor_name || d.name; const contactName = d.property_contact_name; const vendorEmail = d.property_contact_email; const country = d.property_country; const taxIdYOUR_PHONE= d.property_tax_id_vat_number; const currency = d.property_currency; const amountYOUR_PHONE= d.property_monthly_invoice_amount; const paymentTerms = d.property_payment_terms; const bankName = d.property_bank_name; const accountName = d.property_account_name; const ibanYOUR_PHONE= d.property_account_number_iban; const swiftYOUR_PHONE= d.property_swift_bic_code; const html = `

Coupa-Ready Invoice

INVOICE

Invoice No.

${invoiceNumber}
YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
Issue DateDue DatePayment TermsStatus
${invoiceDate}${dueDate}${paymentTerms}AWAITING PAYMENT
YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONE

From

YOUR_PHONE

${vendorName}

YOUR_PHONE

${contactName}

YOUR_PHONE

${vendorEmail}

YOUR_PHONE

${country}

YOUR_PHONE

Tax ID: ${taxId}

YOUR_PHONE		YOUR_PHONE

Bill To

YOUR_PHONE

Remote Technology Inc.

YOUR_PHONE

International Operations

YOUR_PHONE

your-email@domain.com

YOUR_PHONE

Global

YOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
DescriptionQtyUnit PriceTotal
Professional Services — Monthly Retainer1${currency} ${Number(amount).toLocaleString()}${currency} ${Number(amount).toLocaleString()}
TOTAL DUE${currency} ${Number(amount).toLocaleString()}
YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE

Banking Details

YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
Bank Name${bankName}
Account Name${accountName}
IBAN${iban}
SWIFT / BIC${swift}
YOUR_PHONE

YOUR_PHONEThis invoice was generated automatically via Remote's vendor onboarding system and is formatted to Coupa invoice standards. Please retain for your records. For queries contact your-email@domain.com.

`; return [{ json: { invoiceHtml: html, invoiceNumber, invoiceDate, dueDate, vendorEmail, vendorName, contactName, subject: `Invoice ${invoiceNumber} — ${vendorName} — Vendor Onboarding Approved` }}];

parameters.subject: =Your Vendor Application is Approved — Invoice Attached | {{ $('Build invoice HTML template').item.json.invoiceNumber }}
parameters.message:
=

Vendor Onboarding

Your Application Has
Been Approved ✅

YOUR_PHONE🎉 Congratulations — your vendor onboarding application has been reviewed and approved by our International Operations team.

YOUR_PHONEHi {{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_contact_name }},

YOUR_PHONEWe are pleased to confirm that {{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_vendor_name }} has been successfully onboarded as an approved vendor with Remote's International Operations team.

YOUR_PHONE YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONE

Approval Summary

YOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONEYOUR_PHONE
Company{{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_vendor_name }}
Country{{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_country }}
Invoice Number{{ $('Build invoice HTML template').item.json.invoiceNumber }}
Invoice Amount{{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_currency }} {{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_monthly_invoice_amount }}
Payment Terms{{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_payment_terms }}
YOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONE YOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONE

Next Steps

YOUR_PHONE

1. Review the invoice attached to this email

YOUR_PHONE

2. Sign the invoice and return it to your-email@domain.com

YOUR_PHONE

3. Payment will be processed according to your agreed terms ({{ $('Was vendor approved?').item.json.property_payment_terms }})

YOUR_PHONE
YOUR_PHONE

YOUR_PHONEIf you have any questions about the invoice or onboarding process, please reply directly to this email and our team will assist you promptly.

International Operations Team

Remote · Global Employment Platform
